hero.name: Kabirou Djantchiemo
hero.description: I am Kabirou Djantchiemo, a passionate Web & Mobile Developer with a Professional License in Software Engineering from IAI-TOGO. I specialize in building robust backend systems with Laravel and modern, responsive frontends with React.js.

web_app.title: Web App Development
web_app.description: Building high-quality, responsive web applications using React.js and Laravel for diverse clients.

mobile.title: Mobile Development
mobile.description: Creating seamless cross-platform mobile experiences with Flutter, focusing on performance.

consulting.title: Consulting IT & Digital Strategy
consulting.description: Strategic guidance and technical expertise to transform your ideas into digital solutions.

automation.title: Task Automation
automation.description: Optimization of your business processes through automated tools to increase productivity.

portfolio.subtitle: Latest Portfolio
portfolio.description: A collection of my recent projects, demonstrating my technical skills and dedication to quality.

code_route.title: DriveCert
code_route.role: Full-Stack Developer: Architecting the system, database management, and building the interactive UI.
code_route.content: A comprehensive interactive platform for learning driving rules. It offers structured theoretical courses, thematic mock exam series, and progress tracking to guide candidates toward exam success.
code_route.impact_content: The goal was to create a modern educational tool allowing everyone to train at their own pace, thereby reducing failure rates and promoting mobility independence for future drivers.

ticketing.title: Ticketing System
ticketing.role: Frontend Developer: Firebase integration for real-time updates and development of the ticket management interface.
ticketing.content: Robust web application developed for Cognitive Factory to centralize and efficiently manage internal client requests. It enables real-time tracking of interventions, task assignment, and performance analysis for support teams.
ticketing.impact_content: The solution helped reduce internal response times and provided total clarity on workflow, transforming administrative management into a smooth and controllable process.

anb_corporate.title: ANB Corporate
anb_corporate.role: Web Developer at Genuine Service Provider: Creation of the showcase website and integration of performance tracking tools.
anb_corporate.content: Design and development of a showcase website for ANB Corporate at Genuine Service Provider. This consulting firm uses the platform to present its expertise in business creation and performance monitoring.
anb_corporate.impact_content: The showcase website allows ANB Corporate to establish its online credibility and present its strategic consulting and performance analysis services in a professional and impactful manner.

ter_maximum.title: TER Maximum Ltd
ter_maximum.role: Web Developer at Genuine Service Provider: Developing the showcase website for brand image management and logistics services.
ter_maximum.content: Development of a showcase website for TER Maximum Ltd at Genuine Service Provider. The company, a logistics expert in Ghana, uses this tool to present its global freight and import/export solutions.
ter_maximum.impact_content: The showcase website simplifies the presentation of complex logistics services, providing a clear digital entry point for international partners and strengthening TER Maximum's market presence.

aljannah_jet.title: Al Jannah Jet
aljannah_jet.role: Frontend Developer at Genuine Service Provider: Developing an elegant user interface for instant jet bookings.
aljannah_jet.content: Premium interface for Al Jannah Jet, developed at Genuine Service Provider. Offering an exclusive travel experience, it focuses on discretion and instant booking for business clientele.
aljannah_jet.impact_content: The objective was to translate luxury and exclusivity through a fluid digital interface, where every interaction is designed to offer a frictionless experience for the most demanding travelers.

kapygpt.title: KapyGPT
kapygpt.description: KapyGPT is a virtual assistant that uses AI (Artificial Intelligence) to help users solve problems and get answers to their questions.
kapygpt.role: AI R&D Contributor: AI tools research (Firecrawl, Crawl4AI), requirement analysis, technical integration, and assistant performance optimization.
kapygpt.content: KapyGPT is an innovative intelligent assistant specifically designed to meet African needs and contexts. It helps boost productivity through content generation and solving local problems using advanced AI.
kapygpt.impact_content: KapyGPT aims to bridge the technological gap by providing a contextualized AI assistant capable of helping African entrepreneurs and creatives meet their daily challenges with cutting-edge tools.

resume.subtitle: Experience & Education
resume.title: Empowering Creativity through
resume.description: Professional and technical experience in web and mobile development.

license.description: Institut Africain d'Informatique (IAI-TOGO), Lomé, Togo. Focus on Software Engineering and Information Systems.

genuine.title: Web & Mobile Developer
genuine.description: Contribution to web and mobile projects at Genuine Service Provider (Accra, Ghana). Team collaboration for feature definition using React.js, Laravel, MySQL, and REST APIs.

medlitebill.title: Web Developer (Remote)
medlitebill.description: Design and implementation of responsive web apps with React.js for Medlitebill (New York). Laravel back-end integration and international team coordination.

itplex.title: Developer Intern
itplex.description: Developed a certification platform for code examination using React.js and Laravel at ITPLEX-Consult (Lomé, Togo).

cognitive.title: Developer Intern
cognitive.description: Built a ticketing platform using React.js and Firebase at Cognitive Factory (Lomé, Togo), reducing ticket processing time by 50%.
